AICARDMOD-REVELATIONGAIN.title: Revelation
AICARDMOD-REVELATIONGAIN.description: At the end of the player's turn, every 3 [gold]Revelation[/gold] is converted into 1 [gold]Holy Arrow[/gold] that deals 3 damage and randomly strikes a single enemy. This is considered effect damage, so it doesn't trigger Thorns and isn't affected by Strength or Weakness.
AICARDMOD-FAITHGAIN.title: Faith
AICARDMOD-FAITHGAIN.description: A resource that doesn't disappear at the end of the turn.
AICARDMOD-MISSTEPGAIN.title: Misstep
AICARDMOD-MISSTEPGAIN.description: The enemy's next attack deals 25% less damage, then Misstep decreases by 1 stack.
